focus_points.label: Concrete quality bar and what “good” means
focus_points.reason: Whether prior feedback translated into behavior changes or stayed abstract, and what he uses as the definition of good work right now.

focus_points.label: Feedback landing — both directions
focus_points.reason: Whether the feedback he’s receiving is specific enough to act on, and whether he’s able to give you the same level of clarity on what’s working or not.

focus_points.label: Near-term growth focus and practice plan
focus_points.reason: What he feels blocked on in growth, and which one skill or workflow change he can practice immediately with clear examples and a short feedback loop.

focus_points.label: Reliability on commitments and early flags
focus_points.reason: For a Junior in Performance & feedback, predictability is a fast way to make feedback feel fair: commitments, early slippage signals, and closing the loop on what was agreed.
